推荐场景: 银行/邮局大厅｜听懂排队和窗口号
60秒任务: 「排队和窗口」：预约/排队/规则/手续；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 预约｜手续｜规则｜等待｜文件材料｜服务说明
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Where should I line up?（询问排队位置）
Which window is for ___?（询问窗口功能）
Please take a number first.（提示取号）
What number are they serving now?（询问叫号进度）
I’ve been waiting for about ___.（说明等待时长）
Your turn is coming soon.（安抚等待）
Go to window ___ when your number is called.（说明行动）
Is this the right line for ___?（确认队伍）
The line is moving slowly today.（描述情况）
I only need to ask a quick question.（说明简单需求）
Could you tell me how long the wait is?（询问等待时间）
They asked me to come back after lunch.（转述安排）
Please keep your ticket with you.（提醒保留号码）
I think I missed my number.（说明问题）
Can you call my number again?（请求再次叫号）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: line, queue, window, ticket, number, counter, waiting area
Verbs: line up, take, wait, serve, call, miss
Adjectives / Adverbs: right, wrong, slow, quick
Time / Place: here, over there, window three, after lunch
Chunks: take a number, wait your turn, right line, called number, waiting area
